title: phreatia biechinata
intro: Phreatia biechinata, also known as the 'twisted orchid' or 'staircase orchid', is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phreatia biechinata include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as aid in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, where the leaves and stems are boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
